artifact_scope: Lean specification plus deterministic toy reproducibility workflow; not a full BERT/GLUE or attack reproduction artifact.

claims.statement: LoRA update has form Delta W = B A.
claims.reviewer_warning: The general matrix operator is specified abstractly; only the small concrete toy instance is proved by computation.

claims.statement: Training-time robustness can be represented as expected clean-vs-perturbed parameter-update difference.
claims.reviewer_warning: Lean checks the symbolic definition, not empirical correctness on a real model.

claims.statement: NTK/Fisher bridge explains LoRA robustness geometry.
claims.reviewer_warning: This is explicitly assumed, not proved. Treat as a paper-level theoretical obligation.

claims.statement: LoRA/full NTK relationship holds with a residual term.
claims.reviewer_warning: This is a theorem interface encoded as an axiom, not a derivation.

claims.statement: Gram residual is negative semidefinite under stated rank and variance conditions.
claims.reviewer_warning: The condition is recorded, but the proof is not mechanized.
No real backdoor experiment is reproduced in this repository.

claims.statement: LoRA may worsen untargeted poisoning robustness.
claims.reviewer_warning: No real untargeted poisoning experiment is reproduced in this repository.

claims.statement: DP or sign-quantized privacy mechanisms may interact with LoRA robustness.
claims.reviewer_warning: This is a structured hypothesis map, not experimental validation.
Toy reproducibility is useful engineering evidence, but it is not paper-level empirical reproduction.
